mapper.select: /*view colmn name : db comment*/ select cld.HDQR_BOB_DCD, /*대상 : 1/2*/ cld.FRRG_TS, /*적용일시 : 최초등록일시*/ cld.BRCD, /*부점 : 부점코드*/ cld.LSMD_EMN, /*직원*/ /*예산집행사유내용*/ cld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, /*예산집행사유코드 : 비목집행사유내용(비목-집행사유코드)*/ cld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO, /*예산관리비목관리번호*/ cld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON /*예산(세부)사업ID*/ from CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld order by cld.FRRG_TS desc limit 50
